overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a Harry Potter game depicting the Great Hall at Hogwarts. Students in house robes dine at long wooden tables beneath thousands of floating candles in a grand gothic hall with stone columns and vaulted ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: stationary camera positioned at the entrance observing the great hall, looking down the central aisle toward the faculty table

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables eating and conversing
students in house robes dining and socializing at the right side tables

entered.detail: thousands of enchanted candles floating in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
long wooden dining tables lined with students on the left side of the aisle
long wooden dining tables lined with students on the right side of the aisle
massive stone columns supporting the gothic vaulted ceiling on the left side
elevated high table at the far end of the hall where faculty members are seated
ornate stone vaulted ceiling with magical enchanted sky effect visible above

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of the Hogwarts Great Hall filled with students dining at long wooden house tables. Thousands of floating candles illuminate the gothic stone architecture, while students in robes eat and converse on both sides of the central aisle. The camera remains fixed at the entrance looking toward the faculty table at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of the Hogwarts Great Hall, capturing the grand scale and magical atmosphere of a student feast. It begins with a wide, fixed perspective from the entrance, looking down the central aisle toward the distant faculty table. The view encompasses long wooden house tables where students in robes dine and converse, framed by towering gothic stone columns and vaulted ceilings. Thousands of floating candles drift above the crowd, casting a warm, flickering glow across the entire architectural space.
